name: Local Model Connector
description: Manifest V3 browser extension that brokers approved PWA requests to loopback OpenAI-compatible model endpoints.

capabilities.description: Loadable Chrome/Edge extension package for local model connectivity.
Secure PWA-to-extension bridge for localhost OpenAI-compatible chat completions.

assets.description: Built MV3 extension directory to load unpacked in Chrome or Edge.
Build, install, PWA configuration, and troubleshooting docs.

permissions.reason: Fetches only user-approved localhost or 127.0.0.1 OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
Stores non-sensitive local endpoint preferences and optional user-approved API keys.
Runs as a Manifest V3 extension service worker and receives approved external messages.
